description_short: Soft as your favourite T-shirt! Get the softest feel with its knit fabric that does not wrinkle & stays snug with its elastic edges.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash cold with colors. No bleach or fabric softeners. Low-heat tumble dry or air dry.

proprietary_tech.name: Elastic Edges
proprietary_tech.description: Knit fabric stretches to grip mattress.

faq_specs.question: What are jersey bed sheets?
faq_specs.answer: Jersey bed sheets are made from a knit fabric, akin to T-shirt material. The result is a stretchy, soft, and breathable sheet.

faq_specs.question: Are jersey sheets suitable for all seasons?
faq_specs.answer: Jersey sheets are versatile, offering comfort in warmer months with breathability and warmth in cooler weather due to their insulating properties.

notes_observed: Page only fully extracted Single dimensions — Double/Queen/King not visible without variant select. Knit doesn't have thread count (TC=0).
